parameters: _Chaos(id='parse.empty_items', patches=[('dinary.background.classification.task.parse_receipt', {'return_value': ParsedReceipt(store_name='', store_pib='', total_amount=0, invoice_number='INV-PIPE', items=[], items_total=0, total_ok=True, used_journal_fallback=False, purchase_datetime=None)})])

parameters: _Chaos(id='classify.connection_error', patches=[('dinary.background.classification.task.parse_receipt', {'return_value': ParsedReceipt(store_name='', store_pib='', total_amount=100.0, invoice_number='INV-PIPE', items=[ReceiptItem(name_raw='HLEB', unit_price=100.0, quantity=1.0, total_price=100.0, tax_label='E')], items_total=100.0, total_ok=True, used_journal_fallback=False, purchase_datetime=None)}), ('dinary.background.classification.task.classify_receipt', {'side_effect': ConnectionError('broker unreachable')})])
